sections.paragraph:
(from the root טָמַן), plur. מַטְמֹנִים const. מַטְמֻנֵּי-

(1) a place where anything is hidden or buried, especially an underground storehouse for keeping grain, Jer 41:8.

(2) a hidden or underground store or treasure, Pro 2:4 Job 3:21 Isa 45:3 and treasure in general, Gen 43:23.
